[python/helaicopter_api/application/database.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/python/helaicopter_api/application/database.py), [python/helaicopter_api/schema/database.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/python/helaicopter_api/schema/database.py), [python/helaicopter_db/status.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/python/helaicopter_db/status.py)

[src/app/databases/page.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/app/databases/page.tsx), [src/components/databases/database-dashboard.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/components/databases/database-dashboard.tsx), [src/lib/types.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/lib/types.ts), [src/lib/client/normalize.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/lib/client/normalize.ts)

Tests:
[src/lib/client/mutations.test.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/lib/client/mutations.test.ts), [src/lib/client/normalize.test.ts](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/src/lib/client/normalize.test.ts), [tests/test_api_database.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/tests/test_api_database.py), [tests/test_backend_settings.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/database-cache-observability/tests/test_backend_settings.py)

The implementation replaces the old DuckDB/SchemaSpy-centric database page with a real overview for frontend cache, SQLite, and Prefect Postgres, including health, table inventory, sizes, and load where available.

2. Validation commands run and outcomes

`PYTHONPATH=python /Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_api_database.py tests/test_backend_settings.py`
Passed: `13 passed in 0.67s`

`env npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm run lint`
Passed: `eslint` exited `0`

Extra check attempted:
`node --test src/lib/client/normalize.test.ts src/lib/client/mutations.test.ts`
Failed because raw Node could not resolve the TypeScript module imports.

Extra check attempted:
`npx tsx --test src/lib/client/normalize.test.ts src/lib/client/mutations.test.ts`
Failed in sandbox: `tsx` could not open its IPC pipe (`EPERM`).

3. Remaining risks or follow-ups

Prefect Postgres is represented through the Prefect API, so health and operational load are available, but true table inventory and table sizes are still not available without direct Postgres access.

Running lint created an untracked `.cache/` directory in the worktree; sandbox policy blocked removing it with `rm`.
